Driver and header for BMM350 magnetometer initialization, data reading, and power management.


## Files
- **[bmm350.c](bmm350.c.md)**: Driver implementation for the BMM350 magnetometer, including initialization, data reading, and power management.
- **[bmm350.h](bmm350.h.md)**: Header file for initializing the BMM350 IMU sensor.
